g.aria-label: Proteins12 points, 1 of 3 series.

rect.aria-label: X axis shows Nutrition (in grams) and ranges from 0 to 30
Y axis shows Food Types and ranges from Beef to Tomato
Legend shows Nutrition Amounts and has values Proteins, Carbohydrates, and Fat
